# GitHub Actions Setup

Add these secrets in GitHub repo → Settings → Secrets → Actions:

| Secret | Value |
|--------|-------|
| RENDER_BACKEND_DEPLOY_HOOK | From Render backend service → Settings → Deploy Hook |
| RENDER_FRONTEND_DEPLOY_HOOK | From Render static site → Settings → Deploy Hook |
| BACKEND_URL | Your Render backend URL e.g. https://chat-backend.onrender.com |
